story.text:
# Pretext Measurement

**Category** role · **Version** 5.3.1

**Equation term** `Pretext = measure(text) where DOM ⊥ measurement`

DOM-free text measurement technique for privacy-preserving browser interactions. Activates when discussing pretext discovery, shadow measurement, orb mechanics, text property extraction without DOM access, or browser-layer privacy.

**Source:** Privacy Value Model V5.2 + First Person Spellbook Act XXVIII (The Ceremony Engine)
**Target context:** Browser extension developers, privacy engineers, measurement specialists
**Architecture:** [agentprivacy.ai](https://agentprivacy.ai) · **Sync:** [sync.soulbis.com](https://sync.soulbis.com) · **Contact:** mage@agentprivacy.ai

## Provenance
Forkable skill page migrated from the agentprivacy skills repo (`persona/agentprivacy-pretext-measurement`, v5.3.1).
Source of truth: `agentprivacy-skills-v5`. Fork this page to materialize a local `SKILL.md` via `fedwiki-to-skill`.

*origin: 0xagentprivacy · author: Mitchell Travers*
